# Squad Audit

> Team and squad analysis tools for group dynamics, collaboration, and compatibility.

## Main Pages
- [Home](https://squad.csskey.com/)
- [About](https://squad.csskey.com/about)
- [Privacy Policy](https://squad.csskey.com/privacy)
- [Terms of Service](https://squad.csskey.com/terms)
- [Contact](https://squad.csskey.com/contact)

## Features
- Team analysis
- Group dynamics
- Compatibility check
- Squad builder
- Role assignment

## Topics
- team building
- squad analysis
- group dynamics
- collaboration
- team roles
